phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la stazione del Malpensa Express, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah stah-TSYOH-neh del mal-PEN-sah eh-XPRESS, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al piano terra, seguire le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL pee-AH-noh TEHR-rah seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the ground floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AHL pee-AH-noh TEHR-rah seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.french: Al piano terra, seguire le indicazioni.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si va al Terminal 2, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see vah al TER-mee-nahl DOH-ee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: There is a free shuttle outside.

responses.english: There is a free shuttle outside.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora parte il prossimo treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah PAR-teh eel PROH-see-moh TREH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un deposito bagagli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon deh-POH-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, ground floor, near the exit.

responses.english: Yes, ground floor, near the exit.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si comprano i biglietti del treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah-noh ee bee-LYET-tee del TREH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.
